steps.title: Recognize what infinitely many solutions means
steps.content: A system has infinitely many solutions when both equations represent the same line.

steps.title: Identify the second equation's slope
steps.content: Since the equations represent the same line, they have the same slope. The given equation $y = \frac{2}{9}x + 8$ has slope $\frac{2}{9}$, so the second equation's slope is also $\frac{2}{9}$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
